title: Carrier License
description: License authorizing an entity to bear insurance risk in a jurisdiction. Issued by a state Department of Insurance to a regulated insurance carrier following review and adjudication of a carrier_license_application.

license_number.description: Jurisdiction-assigned license identifier. Upper-case alphanumeric with hyphens.

jurisdiction.description: ISO 3166-2 subdivision code for the granting jurisdiction (e.g., 'US-CA').

lines_of_business.description: Authorized lines of business under this license.

expiration_date.description: Date the license expires absent renewal.

regulatory_body.description: Display name of the issuing regulator (e.g., 'California Department of Insurance').

market_conduct_status.description: Current market-conduct standing as assessed by the regulator.
